name: bun-bo-hue
input: spicy bún bò Huế with beef shank, pork hock, and a slice of blood cake
notes: Central Vietnam spicy beef-noodle soup. Heavier on fat than phở (pork hock + annatto oil). Ground truth: USDA beef shank + pork hock + thick rice noodle + chili-lemongrass broth + blood cake (~40 kcal slice).
